paragraphs.text: As a Dutch national, and a citizen of the European Union, I request that video games be included in this Act for digital fairness. I have played video games since an early age and have both physical copies and digital copies. But I am worried whether I am still the owner of games I buy in the future, including consoles. For example, Brazil is not happy with the fact that Nintendo can set off the online services of Switch 2, making the console, which you pay for, useless. Payment processors, such as Mastercard and Visa, have also ensured that several games have been removed from digital shops such as Steam and Itch.io. In some cases at Itch.io even from the customer’s library. This is something that I would like to be protected from in the future.
